steps.title: Apply the equality from the given condition
steps.content: Equal fractions with different denominators force $x-16=0$, so $x=16$.

steps.title: Compute the target value
steps.content: Then $x+16 = 32$. That matches choice D — D is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice D, 32. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
